_comment: Example output of the RIO independent verifier run against example_receipt_v2.json and example_ledger.json.

checks.description: Recompute receipt_hash from source fields and compare to stored value.
checks.formula: SHA-256(prev_hash + '|' + source + '|' + intent + '|' + model + '|' + ai_response[:500] + '|' + timestamp)
checks.detail: Receipt hash matches. Execution record is intact.

checks.description: For each row in execution_ledger: recompute entry_hash from all fields, verify it matches stored entry_hash, and verify prev_hash equals the previous row's entry_hash.
checks.detail: All 1 execution_ledger entries verify correctly. Chain is intact.

checks.description: For each row in post_execution_ledger: recompute ledger_hash from all fields and verify it matches the stored ledger_hash.
checks.detail: All 1 post_execution_ledger hash values verify correctly.

checks.description: For each row in post_execution_ledger: recompute HMAC-SHA256(ledger_hash, RIO_SERVICE_TOKEN) and verify it matches the stored signature.
checks.detail: All 1 HMAC signatures verify correctly with the provided service token.
